reason: Predates the multi-judge strict gate; produced when fp.com was the only judge and suspect_score=14 was acceptable. New gate requires suspect_score=0 AND clean verdicts from CreepJS, Pixelscan, bot.sannysoft, and browserleaks -- none of which this profile was tested against.

new_gate.passing_criteria: pass_all === true; fp.com suspect_score === 0 AND no anti_detect_browser AND no signal flagged

note: Original artifact kept in this folder for forensics. If a downstream consumer ever needs a 'best-effort fallback' before the new gate produces hits, it can read this file directly -- it just won't appear in output/index.jsonl.
